subject: Project Management
title: The Future of Scrum
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The Future of Scrum.

hook.text: Scrum turned 30. The software world it was built for has changed beyond recognition.

buildup.text: AI writes code, teams are fully remote, and deployment happens in seconds, not sprints.

discovery.text: Some say sprints are obsolete in a world of continuous delivery and AI pair programmers.

twist.text: But Scrum's deeper ideas — focus, feedback, teamwork — are timeless. The ceremonies are not.

climax.text: Scrum will evolve or be replaced. Its principles will outlive any specific framework.

quiz.question: What aspect of Scrum is likely to endure longest?
options: Its core principles of focus, feedback, and teamwork
